name: Claude-Mem
description: Persistent memory plugin for Claude Code with 30.5k+ GitHub stars. Automatically captures coding operations, provides AI-compressed context injection across sessions, and achieves 95% token cost reduction. Uses SQLite with Chroma vector database for semantic memory retrieval.
community_quotes: Automatically captures all Claude Code operations

name: ACP Registry
description: Agent Client Protocol Registry launched jointly by Zed and JetBrains. Eliminates duplicate AI agent packaging across editors and removes update delays. Aims to become universal standard for AI agent-editor integration with future support for VS Code and Neovim.
community_quotes: 'One agent registration, works everywhere' - major infrastructure improvement
Solves fragmentation problem of separate extensions for each editor

name: GLM-5 with OpenClaw
description: Open-source AI coding agent framework with 161K+ GitHub stars. Features built-in LanceDB memory plugin for persistent workspace memory, autonomous coding capabilities, and Terminal Bench 2.0 score of 56.2 (open-source SOTA).
community_quotes: Peter (OpenClaw creator) predicts 2026 will see 'complete explosion' of Agentic Coding
Completed over 90,000 GitHub commits across 120+ projects using AI Agent tools

name: OpenCode AI
description: Terminal-based AI coding agent built specifically for the CLI with TUI interface. Supports installation via npm, brew, and curl. Works with multiple LLMs including Claude, OpenAI, Google Gemini, and local models.

name: Agentic CI/CD with Kubernetes Gates
description: Integration of AI agents into GitHub Actions with Kubernetes deployment gates. Features Elastic MCP Server for agentic CI/CD health checks and O11y monitoring. Uses Model Context Protocol (MCP) for standardized AI agent integration.
community_quotes: Traditional CI/CD checks replaced by intelligent AI-powered gates
Automated pre-deployment health checks for Kubernetes

name: GitHub Agentic Workflows
description: GitHub's AI agent workflow automation running on GitHub Actions. Developers define automation goals in natural language Markdown. Features include issue triage, PR reviews, CI failure analysis, and documentation updates with security-first sandboxed execution.
community_quotes: Natural language YAML replacement for workflow definitions

name: Figr
description: AI product assistant for product managers. Chrome extension that real-time parses applications, imports Figma designs, adds documentation and analytics, creates user flows, UX evaluations, and A/B test variants based on 200,000+ UX patterns.

name: Base44
description: Complete backend service for building AI agent applications. Optimized for Claude Code and Cursor. Deploy full-stack applications with a single command. Tested across millions of real-world applications.

name: PicoClaw
description: Lightweight AI agent framework for $10 hardware devices with <10MB RAM. Brings autonomous AI coding capabilities to edge devices. Features /workspace/memory/ directory with MEMORY.md for long-term persistent storage.
community_quotes: Full AI agent stack in under 10MB RAM

name: Qwen Coder
description: Autonomous coding agent from Alibaba's Qwen team. Part of Qwen Agent framework, optimized for coding tasks including writing, debugging, and fixing code. Released as part of Qwen 3.5 framework.
